creator: quik@quikbox.ca
text:
Mozilla 0.9 generally works fine but when I finally needed to use composer, it keeps crashing when I try to invoke it.
This is the console output:

Registering plain text editor commands
Registering HTML editor commands
Have Find = true
Have SpellChecker = false
Segmentation fault

How-To-Repeat: Start Mozilla 0.9 on FreeBSD and select Composer from the task menu.
